data.body:
Debt grew $1 trillion in 71 days, from $37 trillion in August to $38 trillion by October 2025.

This is more than the combined economic output of China & the Eurozone. 

U.S. national debt is projected to hit $40 trillion before the November 2026 elections, likely around August 2026.
